---
title: "Results & Discussion"
---

This page summarises the analytical findings from all three tasks of the VAST Challenge 2025 Mini-Challenge 1 investigation into the rise of Sailor Shift and Oceanus Folk music.

## Story Overview

::: {.callout-important}
**TODO — Charles:** Write 2–3 sentences connecting Tasks 1, 2, and 3 into one narrative arc — how Sailor's career, the genre's spread, and the next rising stars together answer Silas Reed's question about Oceanus Folk: Then and Now.
:::

{{< include writeup.qmd >}}
